title: Rain (droid)

{{Quote|And ''I'm'' the one who can make it ''rain--'' even ''inside''!|Rain|<ref name="DYKWYCA" />}}
'''Rain''' was one of the four [[Android/Legends|android]] creations of [[the Keeper]]. She had the ability to manipulate water.

==Biography==
{{Quote|And yet... even a machine can know ''loneliness.'' Thus, the Keeper created four android ''helpers...'' in the image of its ''own'' creators.|The Keeper's vision|<ref name="TKS" />}}
[[The Keeper]] was left by her [[Keeper's makers|makers]] on the [[Keeper's World]] to restore it after it was devastated in an [[Unidentified war|ancient war]]. To assist with this task, and to fend of her loneliness, the Keeper created four nameless [[Android/Legends|android]] helpers. One of these was an android in [[Gender/Legends|female]] form who could control rain, creating rain wherever she wished.<ref name="TKS" />

During the [[Battle of The Keeper's World]] the androids sided with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] against a squad of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]].<ref name="DYKWYCA" /> During the battle Rain flooded the Stormtroopers with a torrential downpour, then along with her fellow androids led the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to the Keeper.<ref name="COM">{{StoryCite|story=Caverns of Mystery!|book=Pizzazz 7}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Yes! After all, you're in ''our home''.|Rain|<ref name="DYKWYCA" />}}
Rain had the appearance of a [[Human/Legends|human]] female with dark, shoulder-length hair. She was not immediately identifiable as a droid, save for her [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]], which looked like a yellow light shining from black eye sockets.

Rain spoke the least and had the youngest appearance of the Keeper's android creations. She did little to speak up for herself, instead either remaining silent, or supporting the ideas of others.<ref name="DYKWYCA" />

==Skills and abilities==
Through some unknown means Rain had complete mastery over her namesake element, being capable of creating rainstorms of any intensity, from a light drizzle to a torrent. She required no atmospheric change to create this rain, and was just as capable of creating it inside as outside.<ref name="DYKWYCA" /><ref name="COM" />
